text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship doesn't look well, so I take her to the
infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Your Radiant Eminence! Oh, our dear gracious
leader, you've finally awoken!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Okay, no way this isn't a dream!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
How did you—I-I-I mean, I assure you that this is
no illusion!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nah, this is a dream, for sure! Well, if that's the
case...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm waking up because this is one boring dream!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! W-wait, Your Magnificence! You can make
anything happen in a dream! Think how fun that
will be!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So what? Everything in real life already goes
exactly as I plan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: There's only one thing that doesn't—races!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Wh-why is there suddenly a dramatic sunset?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Boredom has haunted me as far as I can
remember. My life was a constant search for new
thrills that never lasted.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That all changed the first time I ran in a race.
Racing is really something else...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Things never go the way you expect, and no two
races are ever the same!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And it's all because every racer at the starting line
runs with their whole heart and soul...

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Your Majesty...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, I'll take reality over any dream! Time to
rise and shine! Self-inflicted thunder SHOOOCK!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text: Argh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That was one good thunder shock, if I say
so myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I had no idea I loved racing that much.
Doing a Golshi Memorial Cup might be fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship leaves the infirmary with a little extra
pep in her step.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Your Radiant Eminence! Oh, our dear gracious
leader, you've finally awoken!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Guh?! Another dream?! Self-inflicted thunder
shock part TWOOO!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Your Radiant Eminence! Oh, our dear graciou—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be kidding me! Wake up, wake up,
WAKE UUUP!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... I think... I'm finally out...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dang, I'm beat...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship doesn't get nearly enough rest to
recover.
